prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为5406→5432→5574→6656→5362名，2024年因新高考首年出现较大波动（后移至6656名），2025年迅速回弹至5362名，近5年整体 在5300–6700名区间波动，2025年基准位次约5362名；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为64人，2024年增至68人，2025年增至69人；2026年 计划66人，较2025年减少3人（缩招约4.3%），缩招将加剧竞争，推动位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第35名， 近年稳定在33–36名区间，属于国内顶尖211层次；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及国家卫健委通报的学术不端事件，对报考心理有轻微负面影响；抖 音综合热度总排名第1（高热），短视频曝光量极高，网络关注度显著，可能吸引更多考生关注；冶金工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与 工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科，材料、冶金为传统王牌，与该校理工科招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐 ，与北科大优势工科方向匹配；黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数约16.7万，较2025年（物理类+历史类约17.2万）略有下降，按历史比例估算物理类考生约11.4万（较2025年11.7 万减少约2.9%），竞争压力略有缓解；省控线数据2025年物理类本科批360分，2024年360分，基本持平；北京科技大学位于北京市，对黑龙江省考生具有较强地 域吸引力；该校在黑龙江省招生规模占比较小（约66人），属跨省招生，地域偏好对报考热度有正向作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5362名、2026年计划缩招（69→6 6人，推动位次前移）、黑龙江省物理类考生总数小幅下降（缓解竞争）、抖音高热关注度（吸引更多考生）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）等多因素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约5 192名，较2025年前移约170名；区间4692–5692名。

- 人工智能。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 5406→5432→5574→6656→5362 respectively. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao, there was a significant fluctuation (moving back to 6656), but in 2025 it quickly rebounded to 5362. Over the past 5 years, the overall range fluctuated between 5300–6700, with a baseline ranking of approximately 5362 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province was 64 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 68 in 2024, and further increased to 69 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 66 students, a decrease of 3 students compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 4.3%). This reduction will intensify competition, pushing rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 35th, and has been stable in the 33–36 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. During the 2026 Gaokao cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents reported by the National Health Commission, which have a minor negative impact on application psychology. On Douyin, the comprehensive popularity ranking is 1st (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, significantly increasing online attention, potentially attracting more candidates. It has 4 A- or above disciplines: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, and Environmental Science and Engineering A-. Materials and Metallurgy are traditional strengths, highly correlated with the university's science and engineering admissions majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended in social heat, matching USTB's advantageous engineering directions. In 2026, the total number of regular Gaokao candidates in Heilongjiang Province is approximately 167,000, a slight decrease from about 172,000 (Physics + History categories) in 2025. Estimated by historical proportion, Physics Category candidates are about 114,000 (a decrease of about 2.9% from 117,000 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure. Provincial control line data: in 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch was 360 points, and in 2024 it was also 360 points, basically flat. University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for candidates from Heilongjiang Province. The university's enrollment scale in Heilongjiang Province is relatively small (about 66 students), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference has a positive effect on application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5362, the 2026 enrollment reduction (69→66, pushing rankings forward), a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Heilongjiang Province (easing competition), high Douyin attention (attracting more candidates), and slightly negative reputation (mildly suppressing), it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 5192, moving forward by about 170 positions compared to 2025; the range is 4692–5692.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering (High-Precision Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Program)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Internet of Things Engineering)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Communication Engineering
- Engineering Experimental Class (Outstanding Engineering Talent)
- Automation (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Intelligent Perception Engineering)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Materials Intelligent Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Engineering (Robotics Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, etc.)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Energy and Power (Energy and Power Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Safety Engineering
- Big Data Management and Application (Big Data and Finance Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 5192, with a range of 4692–5692. For rankings in the middle of the range (about 5100–5300), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors (High-Precision Class, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence) as sprint options. For rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within 4692), focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (above 5600), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also paying attention to relatively lower-ranked majors in Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 1137 → 1073 → 1187 → 1582 → 1212 respectively. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination, there was a significant fluctuation (shifting to 1582), but it quickly rebounded to 1212 in 2025. Over the past five years, the overall range fluctuated between 1070 and 1600, with a baseline ranking of approximately 1212 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Heilongjiang Province was 13 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 12 in 2025, and planned to be 13 in 2026, an increase of 1 student (approximately 8.3% expansion) compared to 2025. This expansion will alleviate competition and push the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science ranking, belonging to the top-tier 211 level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative (academic misconduct incident), which has a minor negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks first overall (high heat), with extremely high online attention. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Materials A+, Metallurgy A+, etc.), while liberal arts majors have no directly corresponding A-class discipline support, resulting in relatively limited appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's liberal arts enrollment majors include Social Science Experimental Class (Law, Administrative Management, etc.), Business Administration Class, and Foreign Language and Literature Class. Law is socially popular and recommended but highly competitive; Business Administration Class is divided and watched; Foreign Language Class is generally watched. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Heilongjiang Province is approximately 167,000, with an estimated 53,000 history category candidates based on historical proportions (a decrease of about 3% from 55,000 in 2025), slightly easing competition. The provincial control line for history category undergraduate batch was 405 points in 2025 and 410 points in 2024, showing a slight decrease. Beijing, as the capital, still has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates, but USTB is known for science and engineering, with a small scale of liberal arts majors (only 3 majors), and the regional advantage is partially offset by the disciplinary structure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1212, the 2026 enrollment expansion (12→13, pushing ranking backward), a slight decrease in the total number of history category candidates (easing competition), high Douyin attention (attracting candidates), and the lack of A-class discipline support for liberal arts, the predicted minimum ranking for history category in 2026 is approximately 1293, shifting backward by about 81 positions compared to 2025; the range is 1099–1487.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Business Administration Class (Digital Intelligence Management Experimental Class) (includes Business Administration (Business and Intelligence Dual Bachelor's Degree), Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Social Science Experimental Class (includes Law, Intellectual Property, Administrative Management, Social Work).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Foreign Language and Literature Class (includes English, Japanese, German).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1293, range 1099–1487. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 1200–1350) are advised to focus on Tier 2 Social Science Experimental Class; those with rankings better than the lower limit (within 1099) can aim for Tier 1 Business Administration Class; those with rankings close to the upper limit (above 1450) are advised to use Tier 3 Foreign Language and Literature Class as a safety option.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology Beijing
